title: 10 best herbal tinctures for cirrhosis
description: Chamomile tinctures helps with cirrhosis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which aid in reducing liver inflammation and scarring. The flavonoids present in chamomile have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, thereby decreasing the severity of liver damage.
